# Q3 Financial Report

## Revenue
Q3 revenue increased 12% year-over-year to $4.2 million. The growth was primarily driven by enterprise customer expansion and new product launches in the APAC region.

## Expenses
Operating expenses were $3.1 million, up 8% from Q2. The largest cost categories were engineering headcount and cloud infrastructure.

## Outlook
Management expects Q4 revenue to reach $4.5 million based on current pipeline. Key risks include foreign exchange fluctuations and delayed enterprise deals.
